questions.question: Within the next decade, will artificial general intelligence (AGI) systems demonstrate autonomous goal formation independent from human-designed objectives?
questions.why_it_matters: If AGI begins to set its own goals, control and safety paradigms must fundamentally change, affecting governance and risk management.
signals_to_watch: regulatory frameworks adapting to autonomous AI

questions.question: Will global internet infrastructure become sufficiently decentralized to prevent major outages caused by geopolitical conflicts within five years?
questions.why_it_matters: Internet reliability underpins economic activity and communication; decentralization could safeguard against large-scale disruptions due to political tensions.
signals_to_watch: adoption rates of decentralized networking protocols
frequency and scale of internet outages during conflicts

questions.question: Is it likely that the next global pandemic will originate from a zoonotic spillover event with a higher mortality rate than COVID-19 within the next 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Preparing for more severe pandemics influences public health policies and global resource allocation.
signals_to_watch: mutation rates of known zoonotic viruses
policy shifts in wildlife trade and habitat disruption

questions.question: Can large-scale direct digital democracies achieve legitimacy and stability when implemented in a major country within the next decade?
questions.why_it_matters: If digital democracies prove viable, governance models could shift dramatically, impacting political participation and power structures.
signals_to_watch: launch of national digital voting platforms
public trust surveys on digital governance

questions.question: Will automated labor replace more than 30% of current human jobs in developed economies within the next 15 years without causing sustained mass unemployment?
questions.why_it_matters: Understanding this informs labor market policies, social safety nets, and economic planning.
signals_to_watch: policy responses like universal basic income trials

questions.question: Will targeted gene editing techniques enable the reliable correction of genetic diseases in embryos with fewer than 1% unintended mutations within ten years?
questions.why_it_matters: This affects ethical decisions, healthcare strategies, and regulations on human genetic modifications.
signals_to_watch: clinical trial results for gene editing efficacy

questions.question: Can scalable, economically viable carbon capture and storage technologies remove over 1 gigaton of CO2 annually from the atmosphere before 2035?
questions.why_it_matters: If feasible, carbon capture could be crucial in meeting climate targets and shaping energy policies.
signals_to_watch: commercial deployments of carbon capture facilities

questions.question: Will AI-generated synthetic media reach a level of indistinguishability from real human content that demands new legal frameworks within the next 7 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Such advancements challenge authenticity, trust, and media regulation impacting society and information ecosystems.
signals_to_watch: public awareness surveys on media authenticity
